subject: fix(ui): consistent text contrast, tab active state, burger menu backdrop
body:
Three fixes:

1. Text contrast — standardized across all 19 components:
   - LayoutTab: replaced text-primary/40, text-secondary/40, text-primary/70,
     text-secondary/70 with text-base-content/50 (disabled) and
     text-base-content/70 (helper) to match every other tab
   - All components: bumped text-base-content/40 to /50 for subtle labels,
     category headers, and helper text (better dark theme readability)

2. Tab active state — MobileNav only highlights a tab when the bottom sheet
   is expanded. Previously Presets appeared active on load despite sheet
   being closed.

3. Burger menu backdrop — moved from inside BurgerMenu (trapped by header's
   backdrop-blur-sm stacking context) to MobileLayout (outside header).
   Backdrop at z-[45] now covers the full viewport so tapping outside
   the menu reliably closes it.

Tags: ui, contrast, mobile, burger-menu, dark-theme
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
